package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerBindsDirectlyIntoModel() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_binds_directly_into_model"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that bind request bodies directly into GORM or persistence structs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
